## Description / Excerpt

A ULiUA guide for moving without needing a fixed destination: orienting by constraint awareness, aliveness checking, and reversibility with consent.

Excerpt:

--- ## Why This Exists Many frameworks ask people to aim for outcomes they have never experienced: - Happiness - Fulfillment - Purpose - Enlightenment - Self-actualization This creates a quiet impossibility. Confidence collapses, belief replaces trust, and aspiration becomes perf
